title: senecio jacobaea var. pratensis
intro: Senecio jacobaea var. pratensis, also known as common ragwort or prickly ragwort, is a biennial plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of common ragwort include its potential to treat bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. Common ragwort can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
